description: Denmark-inspired calibration targets from published aggregate statistics. Values are stylised moments for simulated method of moments; they are not microdata extracts.
sources: Statistics Denmark (2023): employment rates by origin, international wage earners
Ministry of Immigration and Integration (2025): International Migration – Denmark
CBS/OECD cross-country wage-gap study (2024): immigrant-native earnings
OECD International Migration Outlook (2024): migrant entrepreneurship

validation_holdout.note: These moments are not used in calibration; reserved for qualitative validation only in this computational exercise.
